roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Issued
Warrant Discharged
Bench Warrant Issued
MOT VACATE JUDGMENT & ALLOW W/DRAW PLEA, P&A, DEC IN SUPPORT FILED

/CAL MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/MO GRTD/X JUDGMENT AND SENTENCE ARE VACATED PURSUANT TO 1016,5PC AND ARTICLE 1, SECTION 14 OF THE CALIFORNIA CONSTITUTION,/AMEND:COUNT 3 TO 484PC, A MISDEMEANOR/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH1:CJ 30D/CTS:30/X:COURT DOES NOT IMPOSE VIF, SECURITY, AND ICNA FEES,/CCC:#1384613 AND #1389856/

CRT ACC STIP;PROB CONT SAME T/C/EXT TILL 2/3/97 & MOD-PJ5M;CTS36D;NOT
CNSL APPTD;REF APD S/R TO BE FILED 12/20/94;DEFT REMANDEDTRANSF TO D26 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 9AM ON 12/21/94

CAN INT SW-GRANT/E;CONT 6/30/94 AT 9AM IN S26 FOR TS HG MTR/DA
CAN INT SW-E/GRANT;TRANSF TO D26 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 9AM ON 6/23/94
PD APPTD;REF APD S/R;CONT 5/25/94 TS HG MTR/DA AT 9AM IN D22;REMANDED
